subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Federico Ruosi
body:
Hi Federico Ruosi,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at Atomico. Would love to swap notes on Industrial automation, Internet infrastructure, deep tech, Good Connection, Stage: Series A–Growth.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]


--- CONTEXT FOR LIGHTFERN (remove before sending) ---
Context for Lightfern (delete before sending):
interests: Industrial automation, Internet infrastructure, deep tech, Good Connection, Stage: Series A–Growth
